description: Stylish and practical bag in dark brown from kiara.  Roomy and comfortable to carry, the leather effect fabric and gold coloured eyelets will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 21cmWidth: 30cmDepth: 10cmMade of synthetic leather for durability with metal eyelets decorating frontHas a front flap fastened with a magnet covering two pouch pocketsOne long detachable, buckled handle for carrying easeZipped pocket on backCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
